name: Boss is retaliating after I filed for my work illness in Taylorsville, is that legal?

mainEntity.name: Boss is retaliating after I filed for my work illness in Taylorsville, is that legal?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal; file retaliation complaint with Utah Labor Commission.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: No, Utah prohibits retaliation for filing legitimate workers' comp claims, including occupational illnesses.[1] You can pursue wrongful discharge claims.[1] Key factors: Timing of firing suspicious; document threats; prove good-faith filing.[1] Report to Labor Commission and consult employment lawyer alongside comp claim. Don't quit—fight protected status.

description: Illegal; file retaliation complaint with Utah Labor Commission.[1]
